headline: Commercial Building Construction Preparation Checklist — El Sereno
articleBody:
Commercial Building Construction Preparation Checklist for El Sereno Clients

Before your Commercial Building Construction appointment with Opus Builders, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Measurements
2. Budget
3. Design preferences
4. Permits needed
5. Material selections

Contact Opus Builders at (818) 939-8855 to get started.
